issue: exported component with no permission protection

details.reason: Exported activity 'com.appscho.appscho.MainActivity' requires no permission — any third-party app can invoke it directly.

issue: deep-link activity with custom URI scheme and no permission

details.reason: Activity 'com.appscho.appscho.login.WebOauthActivity' registers the custom URI scheme 'onelogin-otpauth://' without a permission guard. Any app can trigger this activity by crafting an Intent with a matching URI.
